description: Sole dependency-update automation (SEC-030/031). Dependabot version updates are disabled (.github/dependabot.yml is inert); Dependabot security alerts remain on via repository settings, not that file.

packageRules.description: Group non-major updates into one weekly PR to respect GR-020 review capacity
Major updates land one-per-PR with the COD-040 justification filled by the reviewer
